title: Earlier Non-Gate Packet-History Residue Follow-On Task Split Authoring
objective: Convert the next remaining earlier 2026-05-06 Olares Dev Residency non-gate packet-history residue into separately executable follow-on packets instead of reopening those earlier decision and execution records as one broad archive-demotion lane.
